use_codes.desc: REDUCTION OF INTRAOCULAR PRESSURE (IOP) IN PATIENTS WITH OPEN ANGLE GLAUCOMA(OAG) OR OCULAR HYPERTENSION (OHT) WITH A BIODEGRADABLE BIMATOPROST IMPLANT

indications.text:
DURYSTATM (bimatoprost implant) is indicated for the reduction of intraocular pressure (IOP) in
patients with open angle glaucoma (OAG) or ocular hypertension (OHT).

DURYSTA® (bimatoprost intracameral implant) is indicated for the reduction of intraocular pressure (IOP) in
patients with open angle glaucoma (OAG) or ocular hypertension (OHT).

DURYSTATM (bimatoprost intracameral implant) is indicated for the reduction of intraocular pressure (IOP) in
patients with open angle glaucoma (OAG) or ocular hypertension (OHT).
